scripts.eas:confirm:
printf '
  version: %s  otaIncrement: %s

' $(node -p "require('./app.json').expo.version") $(node -p "require('./app.json').expo.extra.otaIncrement") && read -p 'Press Enter to continue (Ctrl+C to abort)... '
scripts.build:dev:android: bun run eas:confirm && eas build --profile development --platform android
scripts.build:dev:ios: bun run eas:confirm && eas build --profile development --platform ios
scripts.release:android: bun run eas:confirm && eas build --profile production --platform android --auto-submit
scripts.release:ios: bun run eas:confirm && eas build --profile production --platform ios --auto-submit
scripts.update:preview: bun run eas:confirm && eas update --branch preview
scripts.update:production: bun run eas:confirm && eas update --branch production
